customer_name.evidence: "Aur apna full name kya likhte hain Kamlesh?" "Haan Kamlesh."

age.evidence: "Jaan sakti hu abhi aapki current age kya hogi?" "28."

city.evidence: "Waise abhi aap baat kahan se kar rahe hain Delhi ya Noida?" "Main nahi main Jaipur se baat kar raha hu."

occupation.evidence: "Job karte hain koi self business hoga?" "Main job hi hai."

income_band_inr.evidence: "Jaan sakti hu job se aapka annual ya monthly income kya ho jata hai" "30 lakh per annum."

objections.quote: Main plan karunga aapko khud hi call kar lunga koi dikkat nahi hai.
Main udhar jana nahi chahta ki mera share market mein paisa fasa pada hai.

customer_pain_points: funds tied up in share market

investment_sophistication.evidence: "mera share market mein paisa fasa pada hai"

decision_maker_status.evidence: "Main plan karunga aapko khud hi call kar lunga"

agent_promises: 36% income from first year for whole life

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer is currently focused on liquidating existing market investments and is not looking for new financial commitments.
missed_opportunities: Did not explore the customer's long-term financial goals beyond the immediate market situation.

approachability.reasoning: Customer was polite and even offered career advice to the agent, but explicitly stated he is not interested until his current market investments are liquidated.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent opened with a aggressive remark about being angry, followed by a standard HDFC Life sales pitch.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was passive and polite, listening to the pitch but ultimately pushing back due to current market exposure.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer explicitly declined the offer, stating he wants to wait until his current share market investments are liquidated.
call_narrative.ending: The call ended on a friendly note with the customer offering the agent professional motivation.

key_quotes: Main udhar jana nahi chahta ki mera share market mein paisa fasa pada hai.
Mast raho aur kaam karte raho.
red_flags: Agent opened the call by stating she was angry.
Agent made unsubstantiated claims about 36% income and 8% compounding.
